name: root
author: Nomic Foundation
license: SEE LICENSE IN EACH PACKAGE'S LICENSE FILE

scripts.version-for-release: pnpm changeset version && node scripts/bump-peers.mjs apply && pnpm -w install --lockfile-only
scripts.spellcheck:
cspell --no-progress || (echo "

==== cspell failed ===

If you think a word is correctly spelled, please add it to cspell.dictionary.txt
To ignore a word use the comments 'cSpell:ignore wooord' or 'cspell:disable-next-line'"; exit 1)
